---
title: "Shiva Sagar"
subtitle: "Data Science Student · Community Leader · Science Advocate"
image: images/profile.svg
about:
  template: trestles
  image-width: 14em
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: "https://www.linkedin.com/in/shiva-sagar"
      target: _blank
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: "https://github.com/shivasagarsulige2-rgb"
      target: _blank
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: "mailto:shiva.sagar@keuka.edu"
    - text: "{{< fa file-pdf >}} CV"
      href: CV/cv.html
      target: _blank
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

## Welcome

:::: {.hero-quote}
"Data is not just numbers — it is the language through which the world tells its story."
::::

Hi, I'm **Shiva Sagar** — a data science student at [Keuka College](https://www.keuka.edu){target="_blank"}, passionate about turning complex data into clear, actionable insights. Beyond the classroom, I lead student organisations, advocate for accessibility, and volunteer across my community.

This portfolio showcases my technical projects, academic journey, leadership experience, and the skills I've developed throughout my studies.

---

## Portfolio Sections

::::: {.columns}

::::: {.column width="33%"}
:::: {.experience-card .theme-ocean}
{{< fa user-graduate >}} **Academic Journey**
Data Science student at Keuka College since 2021. Specialising in machine learning, NLP, and reproducible research with Python and Quarto.
::::
:::::

::::: {.column width="33%"}
:::: {.experience-card .theme-sunset}
{{< fa flask >}} **Research & Projects**
Built interactive data dashboards, compared BERT vs T5 for sentiment analysis, and benchmarked classification models — all with live, executable Python code.
::::
:::::

::::: {.column width="33%"}
:::: {.experience-card .theme-aurora}
{{< fa hands-helping >}} **Leadership & Service**
President of the Science Club, Treasurer of DACE, and President of the Campus Activities Board. Volunteer with animal rescues, the Red Cross, and youth leadership programmes.
::::
:::::

:::::

---

## Quick Navigation

| Section | What You'll Find |
|---|---|
| [About](about.qmd) | Background, technical skills, certifications, and professional goals |
| [Other Experiences](other-experiences.qmd) | Student organisations, leadership roles, volunteer and service work |
| [Projects](projects/index.qmd) | Data science and ML projects with live Python code and Plotly visualisations |
| [CV](CV/cv.html) | Full academic and professional curriculum vitae |
| [Reflection](reflection.qmd) | Lessons learned building this portfolio — Git, Quarto, Python |
| [Contact](contact.qmd) | Contact details and professional references |

---

::: {.callout-tip title="Open to Opportunities"}
I am actively seeking internships and entry-level roles in **data science**, **machine learning**, and **data analytics**. Feel free to [get in touch](contact.qmd)!
:::
